lines.english: What had happened to the writer's bag?
lines.raw: What had happened to the writer's bag? | 作家的包怎么了？

lines.english: After I had had lunch at a village pub, I looked for my bag.
lines.chinese: 我在一家乡村酒吧吃过午饭后，就去找我的包。
lines.raw: After I had had lunch at a village pub, I looked for my bag. | 我在一家乡村酒吧吃过午饭后，就去找我的包。

lines.english: I had left it on a chair beside the door and now it wasn't there!
lines.chinese: 我把它放在门旁边的一把椅子上，现在它不在那里了！
lines.raw: I had left it on a chair beside the door and now it wasn't there! | 我把它放在门旁边的一把椅子上，现在它不在那里了！

lines.english: As I was looking for it, the landlord came in.
lines.chinese: 当我正在找它的时候，房东进来了。
lines.raw: As I was looking for it, the landlord came in. | 当我正在找它的时候，房东进来了。

lines.english: 'Did you have a good meal?' he asked.
lines.raw: 'Did you have a good meal?' he asked. | “你吃得好吗？”他问。

lines.english: 'Yes, thank you,' I answered, 'but I can't pay the bill. I haven't got my bag.'
lines.chinese: “是的，谢谢你，”我回答说，“但我付不了账单。我没有我的包。”
lines.raw: 'Yes, thank you,' I answered, 'but I can't pay the bill. I haven't got my bag.' | “是的，谢谢你，”我回答说，“但我付不了账单。我没有我的包。”

lines.english: The landlord smiled and immediately went out.
lines.raw: The landlord smiled and immediately went out. | 房东笑了，立刻出去了。

lines.english: In a few minutes he returned with my bag and gave it back to me.
lines.chinese: 几分钟后，他带着我的包回来了，并把它还给了我。
lines.raw: In a few minutes he returned with my bag and gave it back to me. | 几分钟后，他带着我的包回来了，并把它还给了我。
'I'm very sorry,' he said. | “我非常抱歉，”他说。

lines.english: 'My dog had taken it into the garden. He often does this!'
lines.chinese: “我的狗把它叼到花园里去了。它经常这样做！”
lines.raw: 'My dog had taken it into the garden. He often does this!' | “我的狗把它叼到花园里去了。它经常这样做！”
